steps.title: Create project structure
steps.details: Root directory for both backend and frontend

steps.title: Create Laravel backend
steps.details: Installed Laravel 12 (v12.12.2) because PHP 8.2.12 does not satisfy Laravel 11's PHP 8.3 requirement

steps.title: Install Sanctum for API auth
steps.details: Installs laravel/sanctum v4.3.2, publishes API routes file, runs personal_access_tokens migration

steps.title: Install Pusher for broadcasting
steps.details: required for Laravel Echo + Pusher real-time status updates

steps.title: Create directory structure
steps.details: Organized backend code into logical directories

steps.title: Create Enums
steps.details: UserRole: admin, patient. AppointmentStatus: pending, approved, rejected.

steps.title: Create Models
files: backend/app/Models/User.php - added HasApiTokens, role cast, patient relationship, isAdmin/isPatient helpers
backend/app/Models/Patient.php - user_id FK, phone, date_of_birth, gender, address
backend/app/Models/Appointment.php - patient_id FK, status, appointment_date, start_time, end_time
backend/app/Models/Course.php - title, description, price, image_url, sort_order, is_active
backend/app/Models/Video.php - title, url, description, sort_order, is_active
steps.details: All models with fillable, casts, and relationships

steps.title: Create Migrations
steps.details: 7 new migrations. Appointments has composite indexes on (date, status) and (patient_id, date)

steps.title: Create Event (Broadcast)
steps.details: Broadcasts on channel 'appointments.{patient_id}' with appointment id, status, date, time

steps.title: Create Mailable
steps.details: Queued email sent to patient when appointment is approved

steps.title: Create SlotService
steps.details: Generates 2-minute slots from working_hours for a given date. Filters out slots with pending/approved appointments (locked slots). Each slot = {start_time, end_time, formatted}

steps.title: Create Controllers
files: backend/app/Http/Controllers/Api/NotificationController.php - list, mark read, mark all read
steps.details: 7 controllers. BookingController.updateStatus triggers Mail, Broadcast, and DB Notification

steps.title: Create Notification
steps.details: Database notification sent to patient user when appointment status changes

steps.title: Configure Routes
steps.details: 24 API routes total. Public: login, register, CMS. Protected: bookings, slots, notifications, working-hours, admin CMS

steps.title: Configure .env
steps.details: Set APP_NAME, BROADCAST_CONNECTION=pusher, QUEUE_CONNECTION=sync, Pusher credentials, MAIL_MAILER=log, FRONTEND_URL

steps.title: Configure bootstrap/app.php
steps.details: Added channels routing, HandleCors middleware, statefulApi for SPA auth

steps.title: Publish broadcasting config
steps.details: Creates config/broadcasting.php for Pusher settings

steps.title: Create DatabaseSeeder
steps.details: Seeds: Dr. Halla (admin), John Patient (patient), Mon-Fri 9-5 working hours, 1 about entry, 3 courses, 2 videos

steps.title: Run migrations and seeders
steps.details: All 11 tables created and seeded successfully

steps.title: Start Laravel dev server
steps.details: Server running at http://127.0.0.1:8000

auth.POST /api/register: Register new patient (name, email, password, password_confirmation)
auth.GET /api/user: Get authenticated user with patient profile

slots.GET /api/slots?date=YYYY-MM-DD: Get available 2-min time slots for a date

bookings.GET /api/bookings: List bookings (patient sees own, admin sees all)

frontend_status: not yet built — pending Vite + React + Tailwind setup
